scripts.build:action: npm -w @relasy/draft-release-action run build && npm -w @relasy/publish-release-action run build && npm -w @relasy/validate-pr-labels-action run build && npm -w @relasy/bootstrap-labels-action run build
scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:action && npm run build:cli
scripts.test: npm -w @relasy/core run test && npm -w @relasy/core run build && npm -w @relasy/actions-common run test && npm -w @relasy/draft-release-action run test && npm -w @relasy/publish-release-action run test && npm -w @relasy/validate-pr-labels-action run test && npm -w @relasy/bootstrap-labels-action run test
